content.en:
Although he did not join the Zhenyuan Holy Land under the attraction of Mingyu Dao Ancestor, since he came to the restaurant, Ye Tian still tasted the delicious taste of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

After some negotiations, Ye Tian also deeply realized the sincerity of Mingyu Daozu who wanted to invite him to the Zhenyuan Holy Land.

However, for Mingyu Daozu's invitation, he could only apologize.

After coming out of the restaurant, Mingyu Daozu took Ye Tian to wander around this space.

At this moment, Ye Tian reminded him through the Black Tower mark of the Battle Boundary Tower that someone had issued a challenge to him, which was specially formulated to challenge him.

"Silver-eyed Dao Ancestor?"

Ye Tian glanced at the name of the challenger displayed on the Black Tower mark.

"Silver-eyed Dao Ancestor, Silver-Eyed Holy Son?"

Mingyu Daozu exclaimed in surprise.

"Silver-eyed Holy Son?"

Ye Tian looked at Mingyu Dao Ancestor suspiciously.

"Exactly, the Silver Eyes Dao Ancestor was the 1,000th Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm before he was known as the Silver Eye Holy Son. The silver-eyed Dao Ancestor had a pair of silver eyes, so he had this Dao name. The Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor is the Holy Son of the Swinging Sea Holy Land, one of the Holy Lands! You already know that the half-step domain ancestors who can enter the Ten Thousand Things List are all geniuses of the Dark Holy Land! The Silver Eyes Holy Son can enter the Ten Thousand Things List, even if he is the last, you can see how strong his strength is. "

Mingyu Daozu explained.

"Before?"

Ye Tian heard the surprise from Mingyu Dao Ancestor's words.

"Exactly, originally the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor was the last on the list of all things, because you were suddenly ranked into the list of all things, he was naturally squeezed down. "

Mingyu Daozu said in a brisk tone.

Ye Tian nodded to show that he understood.

"The Silver Eye Holy Son was able to enter the All Things List before, and his strength can be described as very strong, he had a record of killing the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor before! And it was not once or twice that he killed the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and it was precisely because he had a strength comparable to the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor that he entered the Ten Things List. Now, because of you, he has been squeezed out of the list, and he must be very angry. And you entered the list of all things, just because of your winning streak in the Battle Realm Tower, and you didn't fight against the real Returning Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor or the half-step Domain Ancestor on the Everything List, presumably he naturally disobeyed you, so he challenged you for the first time. "

Mingyu Daozu said, his eyes sparkling, and he was very much looking forward to Ye Tian's reaction.

"I see. "

Ye Tian naturally understood.

Although he was in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, he had already defeated the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Guiyi Realm.

But not in the War Tower.

Because he hadn't fought against the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor or the Half-Step Domain Ancestor on the All Things List in the Battle Realm Tower, those Half-Step Domain Ancestors in the Battle Realm Tower were all skeptical of his strength.

Even, Mingyu Dao Ancestor, who wanted to invite him to join the Zhenyuan Holy Land, was a little suspicious of him because he hadn't seen Ye Tian's true strength.

However, other people's opinions did not have the slightest impact on Ye Tian.

"Is the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor willing to accept the challenge of the Silver-Eyed Holy Son?"

Mingyu Daozu asked expectantly, although Ye Tian had fought a lot in the battle platform, no one was able to make Ye Tian go all out in the battle, and they were all killed by Ye Tian in one move.

Now that the Silver-Eyed Holy Son has made a move, with the strength of the Silver-Eyed Holy Son, he must be able to let Ye Tian deal with it with all his might?

It can also allow her to re-evaluate Ye Tian's strength.

"Since the Silver-Eyed Son has challenged me, how can I not fight?"

Ye Tian said indifferently.

After the introduction of Mingyu Dao Ancestor, he was already able to have a general understanding of the strength of the Silver Eye Holy Son.

It's just that its strength is comparable to that of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!

What is there to be arrogant!

His current strength can be compared to the top half-step domain ancestor! When he uses the power of the Extreme Dao, his strength is even stronger than the half-step domain ancestor of the Unified Realm at the extreme of the Consummation Realm, and it can be compared to the power of some of the domain ancestors!

If he wants to defeat the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor, it's very simple!

Ye Tian's words fell, and he walked out of this independent space.

Seeing this, Mingyu Daozu also followed out of the independent space.

The battle of the masters on the list of all things, how could she miss such a lively battle.

When Ye Tian came to the fighting platform, he saw a man in silver eyes and green clothes standing on the side of the fighting platform, looking at the people around him with a proud expression. Disdainful of the flattery of the surrounding half-step domain ancestors.

"You are the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor?"

When Ye Tian appeared on the fighting platform, the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor frowned, and his expression was very disdainful.

Although he is ranked last on the list of all things, as long as he can enter the list of all things, he is a symbol of genius in the dark holy land.

He has always been proud to be on the list of all things!

But unexpectedly, not long ago, a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm who broke out of the sky from a small place with no name actually squeezed him off the Ten Thousand Things List because he had won a few battles in a row in the Battle Realm Tower!

How could he endure it!

Therefore, after learning the news, he rushed to the Battle Realm Tower as soon as possible!

It was also necessary for Ye Tian to understand that the half-step domain ancestor he came from a small place could not be compared to the genius of their Dark Holy Land at all!

"I am the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor. "

Ye Tian nodded lightly.

"Sure enough, it's you! I'm the silver-eyed saint son of the Dark Holy Land! Since you're here, let's fight!"

The silver-eyed Dao Ancestor said proudly.

For Ye Tian, in the process of waiting for Ye Tian to come, he had already passed through the half-step domain ancestor of the Battle Realm Tower to have a general understanding of his strength.

Being able to kill many top-notch Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors in the Dark Forbidden Domain in one move is enough to show that his strength is good.

Therefore, the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor did not dare to despise Ye Tian too much.

However, the half-step domain ancestors who were able to enter the list of all things were all geniuses of the Dark Holy Land!

He had even defeated the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor several times, this was a Half-Step Domain Ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, not a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor in the Ordinary Realm.

So much so that although the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor thought that Ye Tian could be his opponent, he thought that Ye Tian was definitely not his opponent!
